notes:
v0.3.0 — Local Whisper now auto-installs during Welcome.

The headline change for anyone who installs Voquence for the first time: you no longer need an API key to get started. The Welcome flow now downloads the Local Whisper model (~141 MB, ~30 seconds) and flips the toggle on for you. First dictation works offline, no signup, no keys, $0.

For existing users (you), this means nothing changes day-to-day. Your settings persist. But the next person you tell about Voquence will have a much smoother first 60 seconds.

Also in this release:
• The final Welcome screen now shows your actual hotkey instead of the old hardcoded ⌘+⌥+V. (If you're on the v0.1.4+ default of Right Option alone, the Welcome screen now matches.)
• Bug fixes around model download progress + auto-enable-on-completion.

Nothing about cloud mode, BYOK, or the existing modes has changed. Update at your leisure.
